overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with heavy cargo walking through a desert landscape toward distant futuristic buildings, transitioning from sand dunes to rocky coastal terrain with ocean views.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert sand dunes with distant structures

events.description: futuristic buildings first become visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sand dunes toward distant buildings on the horizon

entered.detail: rolling orange sand dunes with wind ripple patterns
large rock formation on the right horizon
tall modern glass and steel structures visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through vast orange sand dunes under a clear midday sun. Sparse dry vegetation dots the landscape. Futuristic buildings appear on the distant horizon as the character progresses forward.

events.description: ground surface transitions from sand to rocky terrain
ocean becomes visible on the left horizon beyond the cliffs

agents.ego_description: traversing uneven rocky terrain with the ocean coming into view on the left

entered.detail: rough reddish rock ground with scattered boulders
blue ocean visible beyond the coastal cliffs
steep cliff edge dropping down to the ocean

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from sand to rocky ground as the character continues forward. The ocean reveals itself on the left beyond coastal cliffs. The futuristic buildings shift to the left side of the frame as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal approach to futuristic structures

events.description: distant mountains become visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: approaching the futuristic buildings along the rocky coastline with mountains in view

entered.detail: hazy mountain range visible on the right horizon
large reddish rock outcroppings on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the rocky path with the futuristic buildings now prominent on the left. Distant mountains appear on the right horizon while the ocean recedes to the far left. The terrain remains rocky with patches of sand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast desert that gradually transforms into a rocky coastal landscape. It begins with the character traversing orange sand dunes dotted with sparse vegetation under a clear midday sun, while futuristic buildings emerge on the distant horizon. As the character progresses, the terrain shifts from soft sand to rugged rocky ground, revealing the ocean stretching beyond coastal cliffs on the left. The scene then curves, shifting the futuristic buildings to the left side of the frame before opening up to reveal distant mountains on the right horizon. Finally, the camera continues along the rocky path as the ocean recedes to the far left, leaving a landscape of stone and scattered patches of sand.
